clusters.label: Algorithms
clusters.description: Classic CS building blocks, parsers, and numerical structures.

clusters.label: DSL / Compiler / Data
clusters.description: Languages, state machines, query engines, and tamper-evident logs.

clusters.label: Async Infrastructure
clusters.description: Caches, rate limits, reactive graphs, and distributed coordination.

clusters.label: Protocol / Integration
clusters.description: Reference protocols and integration sketches — learning material, not production crypto.

modules.name: graph
modules.summary: Graph algorithms with step-by-step exploration: BFS, DFS, Dijkstra, MST, topological sort.
modules.purpose: Teaching and tooling around directed and undirected graphs. Use when you need pathfinding or ordering without pulling in a heavy graph library.
modules.productionNote: Library module with tests. Suitable as a dependency for internal tools.

modules.name: shamir
modules.summary: Shamir secret sharing over a prime field — split, combine, and visualize threshold recovery.
modules.purpose: Demonstrates information-theoretic threshold schemes in pure Python for education and prototyping.
modules.productionNote: Educational crypto — not audited for production key management.

modules.name: diff
modules.summary: Myers diff and edit scripts — minimal edits between sequences, unified diff output.
modules.purpose: Compare lists or text lines and produce human-readable patches. Handy for teaching diff algorithms.

playground.title: Line diff (illustration)
playground.note: Run examples.py locally for real Myers output. This panel is a static preview only.

modules.name: automata
modules.summary: Cellular automata: Game of Life, elementary rules, Langton's Ant.
modules.purpose: Explore emergent behavior from simple local rules with visual step-through.

modules.name: lisp
modules.summary: Lisp interpreter with REPL, macros, and tail-call optimization.
modules.purpose: A from-scratch language runtime for studying evaluation, environments, and macros.

modules.name: parsec
modules.summary: Parser combinator toolkit — compose small parsers into full grammars.
modules.purpose: Build recursive-descent-style parsers without code generation. Good for custom mini-languages.

modules.name: turing
modules.summary: Turing machine simulator with built-in machines and step traces.
modules.purpose: Make computability concrete — run machines, inspect tapes, and customize transition tables.

modules.name: lambda
modules.summary: Untyped lambda calculus interpreter with Church numerals and reduction steps.
modules.purpose: Study functional foundations: substitution, reduction strategies, and encodings.
modules.productionNote: Implementation lives in lambda_calc.py inside the lambda package directory.

modules.name: enigma
modules.summary: Historically grounded Enigma machine simulation — encrypt, decrypt, rotor stepping.
modules.purpose: Cryptography history lab. Shows how rotor machines permute characters over time.

modules.name: morse
modules.summary: Huffman coding — build trees, encode and decode with compression stats.
modules.purpose: Entropy and prefix codes in one module. Often taught alongside information theory.

playground.title: Huffman intuition
playground.sample: Symbol frequencies drive code length. Rare symbols get longer bit strings.
playground.note: Static illustration. Use morse/examples.py for real encode/decode.

modules.name: phantom
modules.summary: Regex engine with NFA construction, visualization, and match tracing.
modules.purpose: See Thompson NFA building and simulation. Debug why a pattern matches or fails.
modules.runHint: cd phantom && python -c "from phantom import visualize; print(visualize('a+b*'))"

modules.name: lattice
modules.summary: CRDTs — counters, sets, and registers that merge without coordination.
modules.purpose: Eventually consistent replicated data structures for distributed system study.

modules.name: sketch
modules.summary: Probabilistic sketches: Bloom filter, HyperLogLog, Count-Min Sketch.
modules.purpose: Approximate aggregates with bounded memory — streaming and big-data fundamentals.

modules.name: glyph
modules.summary: ASCII art dataflow — box diagrams compile to executable pipelines.
modules.purpose: The diagram is the program. Input flows through named nodes drawn as boxes.

modules.name: forge
modules.summary: Validated finite state machines — catch unreachable states before runtime.
modules.purpose: Define states, events, guards, and actions with build-time validation. Distinct from forge_vm.
modules.productionNote: Guards that raise exceptions are treated as failed guards (documented in tests).

modules.name: rune
modules.summary: Sandboxed expression evaluator with fuel limits and typed builtins.
modules.purpose: Evaluate user formulas safely — no I/O, bounded depth and operation count.

modules.name: prism
modules.summary: jq-style query language for JSON-like data — pipes, filters, and builtins.
modules.purpose: Query dicts and lists with a small expression language. Compile once, run many times.

playground.title: Query shape
playground.note: Illustrative result. Execute queries via Python: from prism import query

modules.name: malo
modules.summary: Merkle append-only log with inclusion and consistency proofs.
modules.purpose: Tamper-evident audit trails in memory — study how hash chains prove history.

modules.name: chrono
modules.summary: Logical clocks — Lamport, vector, and hybrid timestamps for ordering events.
modules.purpose: Reason about causality in async and distributed systems without wall-clock trust.

modules.name: arc
modules.summary: Async ARC cache — recency and frequency aware eviction for asyncio workloads.
modules.purpose: Drop-in cache with better hit rates than pure LRU for mixed access patterns.

modules.name: sentinel
modules.summary: Async rate limiting — token bucket, sliding window, decorators.
modules.purpose: Protect asyncio services from overload with pluggable limiter backends.

modules.name: flux
modules.summary: Reactive dataflow DAG — parallel node execution with caching.
modules.purpose: Describe computation as a graph; Flux schedules and memoizes node runs.

modules.name: styx
modules.summary: Async Shamir sharing — distribute and collect secrets across parties.
modules.purpose: Multi-party secret handling on top of asyncio. Pairs with shamir for sync math.

modules.name: nexus
modules.summary: Verifiable ETL sketch — pipelines, audit log hooks, locks, metrics.
modules.purpose: Shows how ingestion, transformation, and audit might wire together. Reference only.
modules.productionNote: Demonstration / reference implementation — not for production deployment. Configures logging on import.

modules.name: reactor
modules.summary: Event sourcing with snapshots, time travel, and what-if timelines.
modules.purpose: Explore immutable event logs and reconstructed state at any sequence number.
modules.productionNote: Demo-grade event store — not a production persistence layer.

modules.name: forge_vm
modules.summary: Fuel-bounded VM with receipts attesting to computation and output.
modules.purpose: Study verifiable computation boundaries. Name collides with forge (FSM) — different package.
modules.productionNote: Demonstration VM — not a secure execution environment.

modules.name: bastion
modules.summary: Stdlib-only async resilience: circuit breaker, retry, bulkhead, rate limit.
modules.purpose: Copy-friendly decorators without framework weight. See BASTION.md for usage patterns.
modules.runHint: See bastion/BASTION.md — import from bastion package
modules.productionNote: Experimental utility — validate behavior before production adoption.

modules.name: audit
modules.summary: Game of scarce audit tokens — unverified claims can succeed.
modules.purpose: Mechanics for teaching incentive misalignment in verification systems.
modules.productionNote: Game simulation — not a compliance product.

modules.name: tribunal
modules.summary: Performance-review game with opaque manager behavior.
modules.purpose: Interactive critique of unverifiable judgment rules in workplaces.

modules.name: signal
modules.summary: Anonymous salary-sharing with employer attestations (protocol sketch).
modules.purpose: Explore zero-knowledge style narratives around aggregate salary data.
modules.productionNote: Not audited cryptography. Do not use for real compensation data.

modules.name: ledger
modules.summary: Mutual reputation — reviews unlock only after both parties commit.
modules.purpose: Study simultaneous revelation and bilateral accountability in rating systems.

modules.name: pact
modules.summary: Multi-party agreements requiring all signatures; amendments need re-signing.
modules.purpose: Immutable agreement lifecycle for teaching consent and amendment rules.

modules.name: witness
modules.summary: Commit to decision logic and prove an outcome matched that logic.
modules.purpose: Algorithmic accountability thought experiment — verifiable decision trails.

modules.name: specter
modules.summary: Phantom-type state machine — invalid transitions fail at type-check time.
modules.purpose: Encode state charts in types; generate code for valid transition graphs.
modules.productionNote: Requires mypy/pyright discipline — runtime is just types and codegen.
